resources.name: Identifying Users
resources.description: How to identify users and associate events with them

resource.description: How to identify users and associate events with them
resource.text:
# Identify users - Docs

Linking events to specific users enables you to build a full picture of how they're using your product across different sessions, devices, and platforms.
